text:
Sha'Carri Richardson and Julien Alfred emerged as the silver and gold medal winners respectively in the iconic women's 100m run at the Paris Olympics 2024. Meanwhile Julien Alfred, hailing from St. Lucia has become the first ever Olympian to secure a medal for his nation ever since they started participating at the Summer Games.
